name: Sales Orders tab shows sales orders with customer, status, and dates
steps:
Given a part 'Finished PCB' is marked as 'Salable' and is referenced in sales order 'SO-2026-005' for customer 'Acme Corp' with status 'Pending'
Given a user is logged in
When the user navigates to the part detail page for 'Finished PCB' and clicks the 'Sales Orders' tab
Then the sales orders table displays 'SO-2026-005' with customer 'Acme Corp' and status 'Pending'
